mapper.select: SELECT r.registration_id, r.project_id, p.project_name, r.lot_id, l.lot_name, l.lot_code, r.supplier_enterprise_id, r.supplier_name_snapshot, r.supplier_credit_code, r.contact_name, r.contact_phone, r.contact_email, r.registration_type, r.status, r.submit_time, r.qualified_result, r.qualified_time, r.qualified_by, r.reject_reason, r.cancel_time, r.cancel_reason, r.remark, r.version, r.create_time, r.update_time FROM t_bid_registration r INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = r.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = r.lot_id WHERE r.registration_id = #{registrationId} AND r.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bid_registration
status = #{status}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, qualified_result = #{qualifiedResult}, qualified_time = #{qualifiedTime}, qualified_by = #{qualifiedBy}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, remark = #{remark}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1
WHERE registration_id = #{registrationId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_flag = 0
